message:
fix: retry GitLab API requests on 5xx server errors

Extend the existing 429 rate-limit retry logic to also cover transient
server errors (500, 502, 503, 504) with the same exponential backoff.
GitLab occasionally returns 5xx during maintenance or load spikes; these
are safe to retry.

Co-Authored-By: iliev01 <31753916+iliev01@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
